origination.corpname: Cornell University. Women\'s Self Government Association

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: Cornell University. Women\'s Student Government Association

did.abstract: Files of Associate Dean of Students Ruth W. Darling including records of the Women's Judiciary Board and the Women's Self Government Association, Women's Student Government Association.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Files of Associate Dean of Students Ruth W. Darling include records of the Women's Judiciary Board, the Women's Self Government Association, Women's Student Government Association, staff meetings, scholarships and funds, student housing, fraternities, and other topics; includes memoranda, reports, senate actions, and registration forms for major campus events.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Associate Dean of Students records, #37-1-1790. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

accessrestrict.head: Access Restrictions:
accessrestrict.p: Access to Boxes 5 and 11 restricted to the permission of the office of origin.
